headline: Airlines Get a Wall Street Lift as Goldman, TD Cowen Raise Targets on Delta, United, Southwest, American
summary: Wall Street sent a coordinated bullish signal to the airline sector as Goldman Sachs analyst Catherine O’Brien and TD Cowen analyst Tom Fitzgerald raised their price targets across most major U.S. carriers. Goldman lifted its targets on shares of Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL), United Airlines (NASDAQ:UAL), Alaska Air Group (NYSE:ALK), American Airlines (NASDAQ:AAL) and JetBlue ... Airlines Get a Wall Street Lift as Goldman, TD Cowen Raise Targets on Delta, United, Southwest, American

headline: BMO Capital Maintains Outperform on Southwest Airlines, Raises Price Target to $58.5
summary: BMO Capital  analyst Michael Goldie   maintains Southwest Airlines (NYSE:LUV) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $45 to $58.5.

headline: Goldman Sachs Maintains Sell on Southwest Airlines, Raises Price Target to $35
summary: Goldman Sachs  analyst Catherine O'Brien   maintains Southwest Airlines (NYSE:LUV) with a Sell and raises the price target from $30 to $35.

headline: TD Cowen Maintains Buy on Southwest Airlines, Raises Price Target to $53
summary: TD Cowen  analyst Tom Fitzgerald    maintains Southwest Airlines (NYSE:LUV) with a Buy and raises the price target from $47 to $53.
